name: HeyBoss
description: HeyBoss — AI-powered no-code website and app builder that generates full projects from conversational descriptions.

seo.title: HeyBoss — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: HeyBoss: HeyBoss — AI-powered no-code website and app builder that generates full projects from conversational descriptions.

when_to_use: Building full web apps from a conversational description no-code
Prototyping product ideas and launching MVPs without developers
Generating complete websites with backend from plain English specs
Creating client-ready projects in minutes with AI-driven builder

pros: Generates full sites from plain-English prompts
Handles both web and mobile scaffolding
cons: Output often needs cleanup for production use
Limited control over architecture and stack
Generic design language out of the box
review.verdict: Great for MVP scaffolds and idea validation, weak as a serious production dev tool.
review.best_for: Founders and non-devs prototyping apps from conversational specs
review.not_for: Engineering teams who need architectural control and code quality

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
